name: In Lausanne: Bus tour to Gruyères, chocolate factory, and cheese dairy
description: Discover In Lausanne: Bus tour to Gruyères, chocolate factory, and cheese dairy in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover In Lausanne: Bus tour to Gruyères, chocolate factory, and cheese dairy in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Day trips
subcategory.description: Find and book a day trip by bus through beautiful Swiss landscapes. Get on and let's go. You don't have to worry about any tedious organization on a day trip and can instead enjoy the ride to the fullest while being chauffeured to your excursion destination. Switzerland's well-developed road network allows excursions to all popular places and natural beauties

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Gruyeres: Discover the picturesque old town and the impressive castle view in summer.

Chocolarium: Children and adults experience sweet specialties in Gruyeres.

Cheesery in Gruyeres: Experience traditional cheese making and regional specialties.
Cheese dairy in Gruyeres: Tour of cheese production with a view of the impressive facilities.
